items.name: Belief-Space POMDP Simplification
items.description: Open-loop and adaptive-structure simplification for POMDPs with practical performance guarantees and safe replanning skipping.

items.name: Active Lighting SLAM
items.description: Near-infrared depth and active illumination based SLAM for robust localization and navigation in low-light environments.

items.name: Motion Estimation Evaluation Datasets
items.description: Contributed to multi-spectral datasets and evaluation pipelines for motion estimation under challenging conditions.
